visibleBrowserLab.binaryPath.markdownDescription: Optional path to a development or custom `visible-browser-lab-mcp` binary. Empty uses the packaged binary.

visibleBrowserLab.cdpEndpoint.markdownDescription: Optional Chrome DevTools HTTP endpoint passed through `VISIBLE_BROWSER_CDP_ENDPOINT`. Empty uses managed Chrome.

visibleBrowserLab.cdpPort.markdownDescription: Optional Chrome DevTools port passed through `VISIBLE_BROWSER_CDP_PORT`. Ignored when an endpoint is configured.

visibleBrowserLab.chromePath.markdownDescription: Optional Chromium-family executable path passed through `VISIBLE_BROWSER_LAB_CHROME_PATH`.

visibleBrowserLab.stateDir.markdownDescription: Optional runtime state directory passed through `VISIBLE_BROWSER_LAB_STATE_DIR`. Empty uses the platform cache directory.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Start one lease-scoped browser session and optionally create its first background tab. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_start_session
languageModelTools.userDescription: Start one lease-scoped browser session and optionally create its first background tab.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: List caller-owned tab leases, or request the read-only target inventory without foreign action handles. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_list_tabs
languageModelTools.userDescription: List caller-owned tab leases, or request the read-only target inventory without foreign action handles.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a background browser tab and lease it to the caller's session. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_new_tab
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create a background browser tab and lease it to the caller's session.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Claim an unowned target, or perform an explicitly instructed ownership transfer. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_claim_tab
languageModelTools.userDescription: Claim an unowned target, or perform an explicitly instructed ownership transfer.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Release an owned tab lease and make its browser target claimable. VBL-created targets remain eligible for session-expiry cleanup unless an explicit user instruction requests leave_visible. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_release_tab
languageModelTools.userDescription: Release an owned tab lease and make its browser target claimable. VBL-created targets remain eligible for session-expiry cleanup unless an explicit user instruction requests leave_visible.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Bring an owned tab and its browser window to the foreground for explicit user handoff or manual inspection. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_focus_tab
languageModelTools.userDescription: Bring an owned tab and its browser window to the foreground for explicit user handoff or manual inspection.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Close an owned browser target and complete its lease. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_close_tab
languageModelTools.userDescription: Close an owned browser target and complete its lease.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Inspect the compact accessibility tree and obtain lease-scoped element references for semantic actions. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_snapshot
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect the compact accessibility tree and obtain lease-scoped element references for semantic actions.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Navigate an owned tab by URL, history, or reload while preserving application focus. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_navigate
languageModelTools.userDescription: Navigate an owned tab by URL, history, or reload while preserving application focus.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Wait for semantic text, element state, URL, page load, or JavaScript state in an owned tab. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_wait_for
languageModelTools.userDescription: Wait for semantic text, element state, URL, page load, or JavaScript state in an owned tab.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Click one accessibility reference after ownership and actionability checks, returning delivery and effect evidence for quiet submit flows. Use CSS only as an explicit fallback. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_click
languageModelTools.userDescription: Click one accessibility reference after ownership and actionability checks, returning delivery and effect evidence for quiet submit flows. Use CSS only as an explicit fallback.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Replace the value of one referenced editable control and return a compact accessibility observation. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_fill
languageModelTools.userDescription: Replace the value of one referenced editable control and return a compact accessibility observation.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fill two or more referenced form controls sequentially and report completed fields. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_fill_form
languageModelTools.userDescription: Fill two or more referenced form controls sequentially and report completed fields.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Insert text at the selection of one referenced editable element while preserving application focus. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_type_text
languageModelTools.userDescription: Insert text at the selection of one referenced editable element while preserving application focus.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Dispatch one key to a referenced element, or to the focused owned document after explicit handoff. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_press_key
languageModelTools.userDescription: Dispatch one key to a referenced element, or to the focused owned document after explicit handoff.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Capture an owned page or referenced element as a renderable image artifact. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_screenshot
languageModelTools.userDescription: Capture an owned page or referenced element as a renderable image artifact.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Evaluate JavaScript for page state that semantic snapshots and diagnostics do not expose. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.
languageModelTools.name: visible_browser_lab_evaluate
languageModelTools.userDescription: Evaluate JavaScript for page state that semantic snapshots and diagnostics do not expose.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Perform select, checkbox, hover, drag, drop, upload, dialog, scroll, or coordinate interaction. Set `operation` to one of: select_options, set_checked, hover, drag, drop, upload_files, handle_dialog, scroll, click_at. Backed by Visible Browser Lab's shared broker surface. VS Code chat supplies conversation identity out of band; never call start_session or invent, request, or pass a session handle. If the host returns session_required, report its recovery guidance. Use only tab_id values owned by the selected session. The tool returns structured JSON success values or structured browser errors with recovery guidance.

description: Native VS Code language model tools for lease-scoped visible Chrome interaction.
name: visible-browser-lab

scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:unit
scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json tsconfig.json src test unit
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json src test unit
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p test/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p unit/tsconfig.json --noEmit

visibleBrowserLab.serverInstructions: Generated during packaging by `cargo xtask vscode-manifest`.
